name: We Were Monkeys
short_description: Trying to escape the lab with your monkey pal, your realize the experimentations made you two see things differently. Can the two of you find your way out in time ?
detailed_description:
Trying to escape the lab with your monkey pal, your realize the experimentations made you two see things differently. Can the two of you find your way out in time ?

We Were Monkeys is a game where you try to leave an expriment lab with your friend by solving puzzles and jumping around. You might realize that you don't see the same things even though you are in the same room. Help eachother (or not) and try running away before the guards manage to catch you !
about_the_game:
